133 W Hurd St, Edmond, OK 73003, USA
Several large pecan trees next to parking lot of park. Smaller pecans but they are very easy to crack. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: November-November.
133 W Hurd St, Edmond, OK 73003, USA
Large pear tree next to parking lot of the park. Pears are smaller, about 3 inches and never seem to get soft but taste good. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: August-August.
